statusLine.description: ESCC statusline: model | task | $cost Nt Nf Nm | persona/workspace | context bar

_comments.setup: Copy the statusLine object into your settings.json. For plugin installs, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is supplied by Claude Code; for a manual install replace it with the ESCC install path.
_comments.display: Shows model name, current task (in-progress todo activeForm), session cost, tool count, files modified, session duration, persona/workspace, and a context-usage bar.
_comments.persona_workspace: Persona comes from the ESCC_PERSONA env var (sdr|ae|sales-manager|revops) or the bridge; workspace is the rep workspace name or the directory basename.
_comments.output_example: Opus 4.8 | Drafting follow-up to Example Co | $1.23 47t 5f 15m | ae/example-co ███████░░░ 68%
_comments.dependencies: Reads the session-bridge file written by the post:metrics-bridge PostToolUse hook (escc-metrics-${session_id}.json). Both must be active for full metrics. The HUD contract is schemas/hud-status-contract.schema.json.
_comments.usage: Copy the statusLine object to your settings.json (~/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json).
